description: Stout and resilient, dwarves are known for their craftsmanship, endurance, and connection to stone and metal.

baseTraits.name: Darkvision
baseTraits.description: Accustomed to life underground, you have superior vision in dark and dim conditions. You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

baseTraits.name: Dwarven Resilience
baseTraits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against poison and resistance to poison damage.

baseTraits.name: Stonecunning
baseTraits.description: You gain advantage on ability checks to discern the origin of stonework.

subtypes.name: Hill Dwarf
subtypes.description: Hill dwarves are sturdy and resilient, with a strong connection to the earth.

traits.name: Wisdom Ability Score Increase
traits.description: Your Wisdom score increases by 1.

traits.name: Dwarven Toughness
traits.description: Your hit point maximum increases by 1, and it increases by 1 every time you gain a level.

subtypes.name: Mountain Dwarf
subtypes.description: Mountain dwarves are strong and hardy, skilled in the arts of war and metalworking.

traits.name: Strength Ability Score Increase
traits.description: Your Strength score increases by 2.

traits.name: Armor Training
traits.description: You have proficiency with light and medium armor.

description: Graceful and perceptive, elves have keen senses, natural magic, and immunity to magical sleep.

baseTraits.name: Darkvision
baseTraits.description: Accustomed to twilit forests and the night sky, you have superior vision in dark and dim conditions. You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

baseTraits.name: Fey Ancestry
baseTraits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.

baseTraits.name: Trance
baseTraits.description: You don't need to sleep. Instead, you meditate deeply, remaining semiconscious, for 4 hours a day.

baseTraits.name: Keen Senses
baseTraits.description: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

subtypes.name: High Elf
subtypes.description: High elves have keen minds and a mastery of arcane magic, with a connection to the Feywild.

traits.name: Intelligence Ability Score Increase
traits.description: Your Intelligence score increases by 1.

traits.name: Keen Mind
traits.description: You have advantage on Intelligence (History) checks about arcane matters. You also always know which way is north and the number of hours left before the next sunrise.

traits.name: Cantrip
traits.description: You know one cantrip of your choice from the wizard spell list. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for this cantrip.

subtypes.name: Wood Elf
subtypes.description: Wood elves are quick, stealthy, and in harmony with nature, often living deep in ancient forests.

traits.name: Wisdom Ability Score Increase
traits.description: Your Wisdom score increases by 1.

traits.name: Fleet of Foot
traits.description: Your base walking speed increases by 5 feet.

traits.name: Mask of the Wild
traits.description: You can attempt to hide even when you are only lightly obscured by foliage, heavy rain, falling snow, mist, and other natural phenomena.

subtypes.name: Drow
subtypes.description: Drow are elves with a connection to the Underdark, wielding innate faerie magic and living in subterranean cities.

traits.name: Charisma Ability Score Increase
traits.description: Your Charisma score increases by 1.

traits.name: Superior Darkvision
traits.description: Your Darkvision has a range of 120 feet.

traits.name: Drow Magic
traits.description: You know the Dancing Lights cantrip. At 3rd level, you can cast Faerie Fire once per day. At 5th level, you can cast Darkness once per day. Charisma is your spellcasting ability.

description: Small and nimble, halflings are known for their luck, bravery, and ability to move through tight spaces.

baseTraits.name: Lucky
baseTraits.description: When you roll a 1 on the d20 for a saving throw or an attack roll, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll.

baseTraits.name: Brave
baseTraits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

baseTraits.name: Halfling Nimbleness
baseTraits.description: You can move through the space of any creature that is of a size larger than yours.

subtypes.name: Lightfoot
subtypes.description: Lightfoot halflings are stealthy and charming, able to blend into crowds and avoid notice.

traits.name: Charisma Ability Score Increase
traits.description: Your Charisma score increases by 1.

traits.name: Naturally Stealthy
traits.description: You can attempt to hide even when you are obscured only by a creature that is at least one size larger than you.

subtypes.name: Stout
subtypes.description: Stout halflings are resilient and hardy, with resistance to poison and advantage against poison.

traits.name: Constitution Ability Score Increase
traits.description: Your Constitution score increases by 1.

traits.name: Stout Resilience
traits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against poison and resistance to poison damage.

description: Versatile and adaptable, humans are the most diverse of the common species, with the ability to excel in any field.

baseTraits.name: Resourceful
baseTraits.description: You gain proficiency in one skill and one tool of your choice.

baseTraits.name: Heroic Inspiration
baseTraits.description: You start with Heroic Inspiration. Whenever you finish a Long Rest, you gain Heroic Inspiration.

description: Born of dragons, dragonborn bear draconic ancestry and can unleash breath weapons tied to their heritage.

baseTraits.name: Draconic Ancestry
baseTraits.description: You choose one type of dragon as your ancestor. Your breath weapon and damage resistance are determined by your ancestry.

baseTraits.name: Breath Weapon
baseTraits.description: You can use your action to exhale destructive energy. The size, shape, and damage type depend on your draconic ancestry.

baseTraits.name: Damage Resistance
baseTraits.description: You have resistance to the damage type associated with your draconic ancestry.

subtypes.name: Black Dragon Ancestry
subtypes.description: Your breath weapon is a line of acid, and you have resistance to acid damage.

subtypes.name: Blue Dragon Ancestry
subtypes.description: Your breath weapon is a line of lightning, and you have resistance to lightning damage.

subtypes.name: Brass Dragon Ancestry
subtypes.description: Your breath weapon is a line of fire, and you have resistance to fire damage.

subtypes.name: Bronze Dragon Ancestry
subtypes.description: Your breath weapon is a line of lightning, and you have resistance to lightning damage.

subtypes.name: Copper Dragon Ancestry
subtypes.description: Your breath weapon is a line of acid, and you have resistance to acid damage.

subtypes.name: Gold Dragon Ancestry
subtypes.description: Your breath weapon is a cone of fire, and you have resistance to fire damage.

subtypes.name: Green Dragon Ancestry
subtypes.description: Your breath weapon is a cone of poison, and you have resistance to poison damage.

subtypes.name: Red Dragon Ancestry
subtypes.description: Your breath weapon is a cone of fire, and you have resistance to fire damage.

subtypes.name: Silver Dragon Ancestry
subtypes.description: Your breath weapon is a cone of cold, and you have resistance to cold damage.

subtypes.name: White Dragon Ancestry
subtypes.description: Your breath weapon is a cone of cold, and you have resistance to cold damage.

description: Small and inventive, gnomes are known for their curiosity, intelligence, and connection to the natural and arcane worlds.

baseTraits.name: Darkvision
baseTraits.description: Accustomed to life underground, you have superior vision in dark and dim conditions. You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

baseTraits.name: Gnome Cunning
baseTraits.description: You have advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws against magic.

subtypes.name: Forest Gnome
subtypes.description: Forest gnomes are stealthy and connected to nature, with the ability to create minor illusions.

traits.name: Dexterity Ability Score Increase
traits.description: Your Dexterity score increases by 1.

traits.name: Natural Illusionist
traits.description: You know the Minor Illusion cantrip. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for this cantrip.

traits.name: Speak with Small Beasts
traits.description: You can communicate with Small or smaller beasts.

subtypes.name: Rock Gnome
subtypes.description: Rock gnomes are sturdy and inventive, with a talent for engineering and tinkering.

traits.name: Constitution Ability Score Increase
traits.description: Your Constitution score increases by 1.

traits.name: Artificer's Lore
traits.description: You have proficiency in the History skill and can add double your proficiency bonus to checks to identify or recall information about magical objects, alchemical substances, or technological devices.

traits.name: Tinker
traits.description: You have proficiency with artisan's tools (tinker's tools) and can use them to create small mechanical devices.

description: Tieflings bear the mark of Asmodeus, with infernal heritage granting resistance to fire and the ability to wield hellish magic.

baseTraits.name: Darkvision
baseTraits.description: Thanks to your infernal heritage, you have superior vision in dark and dim conditions. You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

baseTraits.name: Hellish Resistance
baseTraits.description: You have resistance to fire damage.

baseTraits.name: Infernal Legacy
baseTraits.description: You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip. At 3rd level, you can cast Hellish Rebuke once per day. At 5th level, you can cast Darkness once per day. Charisma is your spellcasting ability.

description: Born in the wild and possessed of great strength, orcs are fierce warriors with a connection to the primal world.

baseTraits.name: Darkvision
baseTraits.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

baseTraits.name: Aggressive
baseTraits.description: As a bonus action, you can move up to your speed toward an enemy of your choice that you can see or hear. You must end this move closer to the enemy than you started.

baseTraits.name: Relentless Endurance
baseTraits.description: When you are reduced to 0 hit points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 hit point instead. You can't use this trait again until you finish a Long Rest.

baseTraits.name: Powerful Build
baseTraits.description: You count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.

description: Strong and resilient, goliaths are mountain-dwelling nomads known for their stoicism and connection to stone.

baseTraits.name: Stone's Endurance
baseTraits.description: You can focus yourself to occasionally shrug off injury. When you take damage, you can use your reaction to roll a d12 and reduce the damage by the number rolled plus your Constitution modifier. After using this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a Short or Long Rest.

baseTraits.name: Powerful Build
baseTraits.description: You count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.

baseTraits.name: Mountain Born
baseTraits.description: You have resistance to cold damage. You also have a natural aptitude for climbing.

description: Charismatic and versatile, half-elves combine human adaptability with elven grace and keen senses.

baseTraits.name: Darkvision
baseTraits.description: Thanks to your elven heritage, you have superior vision in dark and dim conditions. You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

baseTraits.name: Fey Ancestry
baseTraits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.

baseTraits.name: Skill Versatility
baseTraits.description: You gain proficiency in two skills of your choice.

subtypes.name: Ability Score Increase
subtypes.description: Choose two ability scores other than Charisma to increase by 1 each.

description: Strong and enduring, half-orcs combine orcish toughness with human adaptability, often serving as bridges between cultures.

baseTraits.name: Darkvision
baseTraits.description: Thanks to your orc blood, you have superior vision in dark and dim conditions. You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

baseTraits.name: Relentless Endurance
baseTraits.description: When you are reduced to 0 hit points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 hit point instead. You can't use this trait again until you finish a Long Rest.

baseTraits.name: Savage Attacks
baseTraits.description: When you score a critical hit with a melee weapon attack, you can roll one of the weapon's damage dice one additional time and add it to the extra damage of the critical hit.

description: Touched by the divine, aasimar are celestially blessed with healing abilities and a radiant spirit.

baseTraits.name: Darkvision
baseTraits.description: You have a mystical connection to light, granting you superior vision in dark and dim conditions. You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

baseTraits.name: Celestial Resistance
baseTraits.description: You have resistance to necrotic and radiant damage.

baseTraits.name: Healing Hands
baseTraits.description: As an action, you can touch a creature and cause it to regain a number of hit points equal to your level. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

baseTraits.name: Light Bearer
baseTraits.description: You know the Light cantrip. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for this cantrip.

subtypes.name: Protector Aasimar
subtypes.description: Protector aasimar are blessed with radiant wings and the ability to heal allies.

traits.name: Radiant Soul
traits.description: Starting at 3rd level, you can use your action to unleash the divine energy within yourself, gaining wings and a flying speed of 30 feet for 1 minute.

subtypes.name: Scourge Aasimar
subtypes.description: Scourge aasimar burn with inner fire, dealing radiant damage to nearby enemies.

traits.name: Radiant Consumption
traits.description: Starting at 3rd level, you can use your action to unleash the divine energy within yourself, dealing radiant damage to nearby enemies.
